feedback.text: It would be great if this initiative could also protect purchases of digital products, such as video games, movies, etc. by requiring end-of-life plans for content with DRM or other online requirements (E.G. offering DRM-free downloads of purchased digital products, with no reliance on a server only the IP holder can host) Companies having the ability to effectively revoke digital purchases by completely invalidating the purchased products does not exhibit any "fairness" to me Thank you as always for your efforts towards protecting EU customers
